is a village in the municipality of [Keuruu](/wiki/Keuruu "Keuruu"), [Finland](/wiki/Finland "Finland"). It has historically been an important meeting point of major railway lines, which converge at [Haapamäki railway station](/wiki/Haapam%C3%A4ki_railway_station "Haapamäki railway station"). It is 16 kilometres (9.9 mi) from Haapamäki to the center of Keuruu and 74 kilometres (46 mi) to the city of [Jyväskylä](/wiki/Jyv%C3%A4skyl%C3%A4 "Jyväskylä"). According to [Statistics Finland](/wiki/Statistics_Finland "Statistics Finland"), Haapamäki has 857 inhabitants (December 31, 2016),[[1]](#cite_note-1) while according to the town of Keuruu, the population of the Haapamäki village area is about 1,500.[[2]](#cite_note-2)

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/d/d3/Haapam%C3%A4en_keskustaa_2.JPG/250px-Haapam%C3%A4en_keskustaa_2.JPG)](/wiki/File:Haapam%C3%A4en_keskustaa_2.JPG)

Intersection of Pihlajavedentie (connecting road 3481) and Asematie (connecting road 6041) in the center of the village

**Haapamäki** is a village in the municipality of [Keuruu](/wiki/Keuruu "Keuruu"), [Finland](/wiki/Finland "Finland"). It has historically been an important meeting point of major railway lines, which converge at [Haapamäki railway station](/wiki/Haapam%C3%A4ki_railway_station "Haapamäki railway station"). It is 16 kilometres (9.9 mi) from Haapamäki to the center of Keuruu and 74 kilometres (46 mi) to the city of [Jyväskylä](/wiki/Jyv%C3%A4skyl%C3%A4 "Jyväskylä"). According to [Statistics Finland](/wiki/Statistics_Finland "Statistics Finland"), Haapamäki has 857 inhabitants (December 31, 2016),[[1]](#cite_note-1) while according to the town of Keuruu, the population of the Haapamäki village area is about 1,500.[[2]](#cite_note-2)

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/8/89/Hr1_1002_%282%27C1%27h2%29.jpg/250px-Hr1_1002_%282%27C1%27h2%29.jpg)](/wiki/File:Hr1_1002_(2%27C1%27h2).jpg)

[VR Class Hr1](/wiki/VR_Class_Hr1 "VR Class Hr1") 1002 at Haapamaki

In Haapamäki, the basic services are: [bank](/wiki/Bank "Bank"), [pharmacy](/wiki/Pharmacy "Pharmacy"), [grocery store](/wiki/Grocery_store "Grocery store"), [car repair](/wiki/Car_repair "Car repair") shop, [café](/wiki/Coffeehouse "Coffeehouse"), [veterinarian](/wiki/Veterinarian "Veterinarian"), [barber](/wiki/Barber "Barber") and [flea market](/wiki/Flea_market "Flea market"). Haapamäki has two small lakes, Lake Petäisjärvi and Lake Niemelänjärvi, as well as a few ponds.[[3]](#cite_note-3) Haapamäki also has opportunities for [fishing](/wiki/Fishing "Fishing") and [snowmobile](/wiki/Snowmobile "Snowmobile") safaris.[[4]](#cite_note-4)
